content.fact_text: A production-ready base repository class for PostgreSQL interactions, featuring integrated circuit breaking via Opossum, transaction management, and Zod-based schema validation.

provenance_data.behaviour: Provides a generic, transaction-aware, fault-tolerant repository base class using Knex for PostgreSQL, implementing circuit breaking and schema validation.
interfaces: findById(id: ID, schema: ZodSchema): Promise<T | null>
update(id: ID, data: Partial<T>, schema: ZodSchema): Promise<T>
provenance_data.utility: Facilitates consistent, resilient, and type-safe database interactions across domain repositories.
